finding: HSTS and CSP headers are missing on production.
evidence: security_headers.py reports HTTPS yes and four headers present, but Strict-Transport-Security and Content-Security-Policy missing; security score 65/100.
fix: Add HSTS via Cloudflare and add a measured CSP that permits self, required inline scripts, and Matomo.

finding: Core Web Vitals could not be measured in this audit due PageSpeed API rate limiting.
evidence: pagespeed.py returned 'Rate limited by Google API'.
fix: Rerun PageSpeed/Lighthouse later or with an API key; record mobile LCP, INP, CLS, TBT, and Speed Index.

finding: The crawlable internal page graph is intentionally small and dominated by legal links.
evidence: internal_links.py crawled 3 pages, found 8 internal links, and top anchors were Imprint and Privacy Policy.
fix: No urgent fix for a one-page landing page; if feature/docs pages are added, link them from body/footer with descriptive anchors.

finding: Optional Open Graph and Twitter profile tags are missing.
evidence: social_meta.py score 69/100; og:site_name, og:locale, twitter:site, and twitter:creator are missing as optional fields.
fix: Optionally add og:site_name, og:locale, twitter:site, and twitter:creator if brand social accounts exist.

finding: llms.txt is present and high quality; llms-full.txt is not present.
evidence: llms_txt_checker reports /llms.txt found, 7 sections, 6 links, quality score 95/100, and llms-full.txt not found.
fix: Optional: add llms-full.txt later if a longer machine-readable product brief is useful.

finding: Actual unknown URLs return HTTP 404 and noindex, while the standalone /404 route resolves as a 200 page.
evidence: notfound-check.json: unknown URL returns 404 with noindex; /404 and /404.html return 200 with noindex.
fix: No urgent fix; optional canonical cleanup for /404 route if desired.
